zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland於1422年出生在英國達勒姆拉比 卡素時，她的父親Richard de Poynings23歲，母親Eleanor Berkeley39歲。她於1435年6月25日與Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3.結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1484年2月11日在英國達勒姆達勒姆享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland于1422年出生在英国達勒姆拉比 卡素时，她的父亲Richard de Poynings23岁，母亲Eleanor Berkeley39岁。她于1435年6月25日与Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3.结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1484年2月11日在英国達勒姆達勒姆享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland was born in 1422, in Raby Castle, Durham, England, her father, Richard de Poynings, was 23 and her mother, Eleanor Berkeley, was 39. She married Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3. on 25 June 1435. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 11 February 1484, in Durham, Durham, England, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland est née en 1422, à Raby Castle, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Poynings, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Berkeley, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3. le 25 juin 1435. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 février 1484, à Durham, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland 1422 in Raby Castle, Durham, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Poynings 23 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Berkeley 39. Sie hat am 25. Juni 1435 Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. Februar 1484 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Durham, Durham, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland è nata il nel 1422 nel Raby Castle, Durham, England, sua padre, Richard de Poynings, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Berkeley, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3. il 25 giugno 1435. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 11 febbraio 1484, nel Durham, Durham, England, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberlandが1422年にイギリスダルハムラビー カストルで生まれた時，父Richard de Poyningsは23歳，母Eleanor Berkeleyは39歳であった。1435年6月25日にHenry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1484年2月11日にイギリスダルハムダルハムで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland(이)가 1422년 영국 뒤람 라비 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Poynings(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Berkeley(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1435년 6월 25일 Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1484년 2월 11일 영국 뒤람 뒤람에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland nasceu em 1422, em Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Poynings, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Berkeley, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3. em 25 de junho de 1435. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de fevereiro de 1484, em Durham, Durham, Inglaterra, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland родилась в 1422 г. в местности раби кастл, дурам, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard de Poynings было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Berkeley, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3. 25 июня 1435 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 11 февраля 1484 г. в местности дурам, дурам, Англия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland nació en 1422, en Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Poynings, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Eleanor Berkeley, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3. el 25 de junio de 1435. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 11 de febrero de 1484, en Durham, Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años.
